# 🍔 FoodExpress - Food Ordering System

## 📌 Project Description
FoodExpress is a full-stack food ordering web application where users can browse menu items, add to cart, place orders, and track their orders in real-time. Admin has a dedicated panel to manage products (CRUD operations) and view all customer orders.

## ✨ Features

### User Side
- User Authentication (Login/Register)
- Browse menu with category filters
- Search food items
- Add to cart
- Checkout with address
- Cash on Delivery & Demo Online Payment
- Real-time order tracking
- Order history

### Admin Side
- Secure admin login
- Dashboard with statistics
- Product Management (Add/Edit/Delete)
- View all customer orders
- Update order status

## 🛠️ Technologies Used

### Frontend
- React.js
- React Router
- Context API (Auth & Cart)
- Axios
- Framer Motion (Animations)
- React Hot Toast

### Backend
- Node.js
- Express.js
- MongoDB
- Mongoose
- JWT Authentication
- Bcrypt (Password Hashing)

## 🚀 Installation & Setup

### Prerequisites
- Node.js installed
- MongoDB installed locally
